image:image.image:title: Youth Sport Trust, National School Sports Week 2023 Pledge to Play, Portcullis House, London, UK - 24 May 2023
image:image.image:caption: Cross party MPs. pledge their support for the Youth Sport Trust, National School Sports Week 2023. This 'Pledge to Play' encourages schools to hit the minimum of 60 minutes a day physical activity target for all children. London, UK - 24/05/2023 Picture: Andrew Fosker for Youth Sport Trust
